name: Debouncer (timer-based)
task: Create /tmp/eval_deb/deb.py with class Debouncer(delay, fn). Calling the instance schedules fn(*args, **kwargs) to fire after `delay` seconds of no further calls. Each call cancels the previous pending timer. Use threading.Timer (daemon=True). Provide cancel() to abort any pending fire.

validation.script: import importlib.util,time; spec = importlib.util.spec_from_file_location('m','/tmp/eval_deb/deb.py'); mod = importlib.util.module_from_spec(spec); spec.loader.exec_module(mod); calls = []; d = mod.Debouncer(0.3, lambda x: calls.append(x)); d('a'); d('b'); d('c'); time.sleep(0.1); assert calls == [], f'fired before debounce window: {calls}'; time.sleep(0.7); assert calls == ['c'], f'got {calls}'; d.cancel(); print('OK')
